rationale: Zero cost, full customization, data ownership, integrated with existing Stripe promo codes and payment links. No external dependencies.

routes_created: /api/foundermaxxing-apply (upgraded — new fields, validation, dupe detection, pipeline stats in alert email)
/api/foundermaxxing-admin (GET applications, PATCH status, POST generate-draft, POST send-email, GET drafts)
/foundermaxxing (updated form — 8 fields, capital asterisk, AI tool stack up to 5, FAQ addition)
/foundermaxxing/admin (private dashboard — stats, filters, expand/collapse, notes, approve/reject/waitlist, draft generation + review + send)
form_fields: AI Tool Stack (1-5 entries, at least 1 required)

approval_flow.step_1: Application submitted → JSON stored → V notified via email with pipeline stats
approval_flow.step_3: On approve → 'Generate Email Draft' button → /zo/ask with Opus generates personalized draft pulling from meeting notes
approval_flow.step_4: V reviews draft in modal, edits as needed, clicks Send → email sent from me@vrijenattawar.com via Gmail
approval_flow.founding_promo: Draft includes FOUNDING promo code + payment link for first 30 approvals. After 30, no automatic promo.

implementation_details.post_cap_behavior: No automatic promo. V manually offers LAUNCH2026 if desired.
